title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindustan Petroleum - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindustan Petroleum - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindustan Petroleum:
Hindustan Petroleum is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
